name: akbun-writing
description: Writing, review, and blog support skills by akbun

interface.shortDescription: Korean writing and blog support skills
interface.longDescription: Writing, review, hands-on, publishing, and draw.io architecture diagram skills for Korean technical documents and blog posts in akbun's working style.
defaultPrompt: Write a Korean technical blog post in akbun's style
Write an akbun-style study post driven by questions
Write an akbun-style post in 설득식/persuasive form (악분설득스타일)
Review this draft against akbun's writing rules
Convert this Obsidian markdown post for publishing
Create a draw.io AWS VPC architecture diagram
Make an image prompt that explains this code as a blog figure
Draw a high-level component architecture diagram of this code
Make an image prompt showing how traffic flows between these components
Generate click-worthy Korean headline candidates for this draft
Make a 3 or 4 panel webtoon prompt from this story
Make a stitched-text image prompt for a motivational quote
Make a pencil sketchbook concept-card image prompt for this topic
Make hand-drawn storytelling image prompts for this story
Make a card news set (cover, quote pages, SVG for Figma/Canva) from this content
